name: multi-agent-orchestrator
description: Orchestrates multiple AI coding CLI agents (Claude Code, Gemini CLI) working as a team

scripts.build: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml build worker-gemini worker-claude
scripts.build:workers: docker build -t worker-gemini -f docker/workers/Dockerfile.gemini . && docker build -t worker-claude -f docker/workers/Dockerfile.claude .
scripts.reset-state: npm run kill-mcp 2>/dev/null; git worktree list --porcelain | grep '^worktree ' | grep '.worktrees' | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -r -n 1 git worktree remove --force 2>/dev/null; git branch --list 'agent/*' | tr -d ' +*' | xargs -r -n 1 git branch -D 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.local/share/multi-agent-orchestrator-v3 && echo 'State cleared'
